productDisplayName: BIBA OUTLET Women Fushsia Pink Kurti
description: CompositionFuchsia pink kurti made of 100% cotton, has a mandarin collar with a ruffle detail and a slit neckline, yoke on the chest with Hakuba detailing and pin-tucks, buttoned chest placket, three quarter sleeves with pin-tucks and ruffle detailing, Hakuba detailing at the back with a pleat and a vented hemFitRegularWash careWash separately in cold waterDo not bleachDry in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsThe neckline, yoke, cuffs and vents on this kurti from biba are decorated with beautiful pin-tucks, Hakuba and ruffle detail which makes this top stand out as unique. Wear this over leggings or over trousers depending on the occasion. Smart enough to wear to the office or to a formal party, dress this kurti up by wearing bold earrings and bangles.Model statisticsThe product is a size 36 on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
